BrowserNamespace.attach: (options: { cdp?: string | undefined; endpoint?: string | undefined; port?: number | undefined; targetType?: string | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ attached: boolean; endpoint: string; }>>
BrowserNamespace.click: (options: { target: string; timeoutMs?: number | undefined; force?: boolean | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ clicked: string; }>>
BrowserNamespace.fill: (options: { target: string; text: string; timeoutMs?: number | undefined; commit?: boolean | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ filled: string; }>>
BrowserNamespace.hover: (options: { target: string; timeoutMs?: number | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ hovered: string; }>>
BrowserNamespace.open: (options: { url: string; waitUntil?: "load" | "domcontentloaded" | "networkidle" | "commit" | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ url: string; title: string; }>>
BrowserNamespace.screenshot: (options?: { outputPath?: string | undefined; fullPage?: boolean | undefined; target?: string | undefined; annotate?: boolean | undefined; refs?: string[] | undefined; } | undefined): Promise<...>
BrowserNamespace.scroll: (options: { direction: "up" | "down" | "left" | "right"; amount?: number | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ scrolled: string; }>>
BrowserNamespace.snapshot: (options?: { rootSelector?: string | undefined; boxes?: boolean | undefined; } | undefined): Promise<ActionResult<A11ySnapshot>>
BrowserNamespace.tabList: (): Promise<ActionResult<{ id: string; url: string; title: string; }[]>>
BrowserNamespace.type: (options: { text: string; delayMs?: number | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ typed: string; }>>

DebugNamespace.listBundles: (): { bundleId: string; taskId: string; assembledAt: string; partial: boolean; }[]

FsNamespace.ls: (options: { path: string; recursive?: boolean | undefined; extension?: string | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<ListResult>>
FsNamespace.read: (options: { path: string; maxBytes?: number | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<FileReadResult>>
FsNamespace.rm: (options: { path: string; recursive?: boolean | undefined; force?: boolean | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<DeleteResult>>
FsNamespace.write: (options: { path: string; content: string; createDirs?: boolean | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<FileWriteResult>>

ServiceNamespace.register: (options: { name: string; port: number; protocol?: "http" | "https" | undefined; path?: string | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<ServiceEntry>>
ServiceNamespace.resolve: (options: { name: string; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ url: string; service?: ServiceEntry | undefined; }>>

SessionNamespace.create: (name: string, options?: { policyProfile?: string | undefined; workingDirectory?: string | undefined; } | undefined): Promise<ActionResult<SessionState>>

TerminalNamespace.exec: (options: { command: string; sessionId?: string | undefined; timeoutMs?: number | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<ExecResult>>
TerminalNamespace.onOutput: (listener: (sessionId: string, data: string) => void): { dispose(): void; }
TerminalNamespace.open: (options?: { shell?: string | undefined; cwd?: string | undefined; name?: string | undefined; } | undefined): Promise<ActionResult<{ id: string; shell: string; cwd: string; status: string; }>>
TerminalNamespace.read: (options: { sessionId: string; maxBytes?: number | undefined; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ output: string; }>>
TerminalNamespace.resize: (options: { sessionId: string; cols: number; rows: number; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ resized: boolean; }>>
TerminalNamespace.snapshot: (options?: { sessionId?: string | undefined; } | undefined): Promise<ActionResult<TerminalSnapshot | TerminalSnapshot[]>>
TerminalNamespace.type: (options: { text: string; sessionId: string; }): Promise<ActionResult<{ typed: string; }>>
